/opt/homebrew/bin/i686-elf-gcc -m32 -no-pie -nostdlib -nostartfiles -nodefaultlibs -Wl,-T,/Users/nico/Documents/OS/boot/linker.ld -Wl,--build-id=none CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/boot/boot.S.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/kernel/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/libs/src/boot/boot.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/libs/src/boot/paging.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/libs/src/boot/privledge.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/libs/src/graphics/draw.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/libs/src/graphics/init.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/libs/src/input/mouse.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/libs/src/interrupts/idt.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.dir/libs/src/interrupts/pic.c.obj FONT.F16.o -o compiled/MyOS.bin
